title: The Married Mouse
content:
So the Mouse had Miss Lion for bride;
    Very great was his joy and his pride:
    But it chanced that she put
    On her husband her foot,
    And the weight was too much, so he died.

    One May Be Too Ambitious
meaning:
"The Married Mouse" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
